title: Etsy Q4 2024 Earnings Announcement
text: Etsy will unveil its fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financial results on Wednesday, February 19, 2025, before market opening. The company will conduct a video webcast conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to discuss results. Investors and analysts can access the live stream through Etsy's Investor Relations portal at investors.etsy.com under the events section. The earnings presentation will also be posted to the website. A recorded replay will be available starting at 12:00 p.m. ET that same day and will remain accessible for at least three months. Etsy operates two-sided online marketplaces connecting buyers and sellers globally. Its portfolio includes the primary Etsy.com marketplace, fashion resale platform Depop, and Reverb, a music gear marketplace. The company is headquartered in Brooklyn, New York.
